title: Easy Oxidization
description: Craft oxidized copper easily with bone meal!
body:
Adds crafting recipes for every stage of copper block oxidization, aswell as easy wax removal and deoxidization using the stonecutter

You can oxidize copper using a copper block and a single piece of bone meal (shapeless)

Oxidizations happens in stages, so to fully oxidize a clean copper block you will need 3 bone meal
